gac.desc: Stage all changes and create a commit with the given message.

clean.desc: Remove all cached files, re-add everything, then commit with message.
clean.cmd: git rm -r --cached . ; git add . ; git commit -am <T: string>

gcb.desc: Create a new git branch and immediately switch to it.

gbdel.desc: Delete a local branch that has been fully merged into upstream.

glog.desc: Display the recent commits in a compact one-line format.

gpf.desc: Force push current branch to remote origin. Use with caution.

grepfind.desc: Recursively search for a given string in files, showing line numbers.

biggest.desc: List the top N largest items in current directory sorted by size (human readable).

killport.desc: Find and forcefully terminate the process listening on the specified port.

backup.desc: Create a .tar.gz archive of current directory with a timestamp in the name.

renamepre.desc: Add a specified prefix to all files matching a given pattern.
renamepre.cmd: for f in <T: string>; do mv "$f" "<T: string>_$f"; done

vid2gif.desc: Convert a video file to high-quality GIF using ffmpeg with palette optimization.
vid2gif.cmd: ffmpeg -i <T: string> -vf "fps=10,scale=640:-1:flags=lanczos,palettegen" -y palette.png ; ffmpeg -i <T: string> -i palette.png -filter_complex "fps=10,scale=640:-1[x];[x][1:v]paletteuse" -y output.gif ; rm palette.png

sshexec.desc: Execute a command on a remote host via SSH without opening a full shell.

serve.desc: Start a Python HTTP server on the specified port to serve current directory.

chmodr.desc: Change permissions recursively for a given path, asking for confirmation first.

rgs.desc: Search for a given string in files, showing line numbers.

pack.desc: Compile all ribbon entry points into HlinPSModule/bin.
pack.cmd: bun build --compile --target=bun --packages bundle --compile-autoload-package-json  --bundle ./user.idx.ts --outfile=./HlinPSModule/bin/user.exe && bun build --compile  --packages bundle --compile-autoload-package-json --bundle --target=bun ./execute.idx.ts --outfile=./HlinPSModule/bin/execute.exe && bun build  --compile --target=bun --packages bundle --compile-autoload-package-json --bundle ./src/ribbon.idx.ts --outfile=./HlinPSModule/bin/ribbon.exe && bun build --packages bundle --compile-autoload-package-json --compile   --target=bun --bundle ./_user/utils/index.ts --outfile=./HlinPSModule/bin/utils.exe

zip.desc: Search for a given string in files, showing line numbers.
